speed.label: Speed (mph)
speed.expr: (arraySum(mapValues(maxMap(map(ds.tmc, table1.miles)))) * 3600) / arraySum(mapValues(avgMapIf(map(ds.tmc, toFloat64(ds.travel_time_all_vehicles)), ds.travel_time_all_vehicles != 0))) as speed

hoursOfDelay.label: Hours of Delay
hoursOfDelay.expr: (greatest(0, nullIf(ds.travel_time_all_vehicles, 0) - ((table1.miles / greatest(20, table1.avg_speedlimit * 0.6)) * 3600)) / 3600) * (nullIf(table1.aadt, 0) / (if(table1.faciltype > 1, 2, 1))) * arrayElement(table2.distributions, ds.epoch + 1) as hours_of_delay

avgHoursOfDelay.label: Avg. Hours of Delay
avgHoursOfDelay.expr: (sum((greatest(0, nullIf(ds.travel_time_all_vehicles, 0) - ((table1.miles / greatest(20, table1.avg_speedlimit * 0.6)) * 3600)) / 3600) * (nullIf(table1.aadt, 0) / (if(table1.faciltype > 1, 2, 1))) * arrayElement(table2.distributions, ds.epoch + 1)) / count(DISTINCT ds.date)) as avg_hours_of_delay

joinColumns.dsColumn: if(toDayOfWeek(ds.date, 2) IN (6,7), concat('WEEKEND_', if(table1.f_system < 3, 'FREEWAY', 'NONFREEWAY')), concat('WEEKDAY_', table1.congestion_level, '_', table1.directionality, '_', if(table1.f_system < 3, 'FREEWAY', 'NONFREEWAY'))) as dist_key
